about.heading: About West Coast Solar
about.body:
West Coast Solar is a locally-owned solar installation company based in Leeming, Western Australia. Led by Wade, our team brings years of experience and genuine expertise to every project. We specialise in residential solar panel systems and battery storage, handling everything from design and installation to paperwork and rebate schemes.

Our commitment to quality is reflected in the work we do. Every installation is carried out to the highest standards, with meticulous attention to detail and professional workmanship. We work closely with our customers throughout the process, ensuring they understand their system and feel confident in their investment in clean energy.

values.title: Quality Workmanship
values.body: Professional installation with meticulous attention to detail and pride in every job.

values.title: Locally Owned
values.body: Family-run business based in Leeming, serving Perth's southern suburbs.

values.title: Full Support
values.body: We handle rebates, paperwork, and provide ongoing support throughout your system's life.

services.title: Solar Panel Installation
services.summary: Professional installation of high-quality residential solar systems designed for your home.
services.intro: West Coast Solar installs high-quality residential solar systems tailored to your home's energy needs. Based in Leeming, Wade and his team handle everything from initial design through to installation and rebate paperwork. Systems typically range from 5kW to 10kW, delivering immediate savings and long-term value.
benefits: Reduce your electricity bills immediately with clean, renewable energy from day one.
Expert installation from Wade ensures every system is installed to the highest standard.
Competitive pricing plus assistance with government rebates and paperwork.

faqs.question: How long does a solar installation typically take?
faqs.answer: Most residential installations are completed in one to two days, depending on system size and roof complexity. Wade's team works efficiently while maintaining our high standards for workmanship and safety.

faqs.question: What size system do I need?
faqs.answer: System size depends on your annual electricity usage, roof orientation, and shading. We conduct a free site assessment and recommend a size that balances your budget and energy goals.

seo.title: Solar Panel Installation in Leeming | West Coast Solar
seo.description: Professional solar panel installation from West Coast Solar in Leeming. Expert installation, competitive pricing, and rebate assistance. Get your free quote today.

services.title: Battery Storage Systems
services.summary: Add energy storage to your solar system for 24/7 power independence and maximum savings.
services.intro: Add energy storage to your solar system and enjoy power independence 24/7. West Coast Solar installs premium battery systems in Leeming and surrounding suburbs, with capacities from 10kW up to 20kW+. Store the energy you generate during the day and use it when you need it most.
benefits: Maximize savings by using your own stored energy instead of buying from the grid at peak rates.
Protect against blackouts and enjoy energy independence even when the power goes down.
Pair with your existing solar system or install as a standalone energy solution.

faqs.question: Can I add batteries to my existing solar system?
faqs.answer: Yes. West Coast Solar retrofits battery storage to most existing solar installations. We assess your current setup and recommend the right capacity to complement your system.

faqs.question: How much does battery storage cost?
faqs.answer: Battery costs vary depending on capacity and the specific system you choose. We provide a free quote based on your energy needs and budget.

seo.title: Battery Storage Systems in Leeming | West Coast Solar
seo.description: Add battery storage to your solar system in Leeming. West Coast Solar installs premium home battery systems with expert support. Get a free quote.

services.title: Solar System Upgrades
services.summary: Expand your existing solar system with additional capacity and the latest monitoring technology.
services.intro: Expand your solar system with additional panels and the latest monitoring technology. If your existing setup no longer meets your needs, West Coast Solar upgrades your capacity and improves performance. Our Leeming team can scale systems from 5kW to 15kW+ in days.
benefits: Increase your power generation to match higher energy demands or lower your payback period.
Upgrade inverters and monitoring to get real-time visibility of your system performance.
Leverage the latest panel technology for better efficiency and durability.

faqs.question: Is it worth upgrading my older solar system?
faqs.answer: If your system is over 5–7 years old, newer panels are more efficient and modern inverters offer better monitoring. We assess your current setup and show you the ROI of an upgrade.

faqs.question: Can you upgrade just the inverter without adding panels?
faqs.answer: Yes. If your panels are still performing well, upgrading the inverter improves efficiency and gives you better data on energy production and use.

seo.title: Solar System Upgrades in Leeming | West Coast Solar
seo.description: Upgrade your solar system with additional capacity and modern monitoring. West Coast Solar scales systems for more savings. Free site assessment available.

services.title: Solar Maintenance & Monitoring
services.summary: Keep your system performing optimally with professional cleaning, servicing, and customer support.
services.intro: Keep your solar system running at peak efficiency with professional cleaning and monitoring from West Coast Solar. Dust, debris, and bird droppings reduce output—our Leeming team cleans panels and checks all components to ensure your system performs as expected, year after year.
benefits: Keep system output high by removing dirt and debris that blocks sunlight from reaching panels.
Catch performance issues early with regular inspections and monitoring alerts.
Extend the lifespan of your equipment through preventive maintenance and professional care.

faqs.question: How often should I have my solar panels cleaned?
faqs.answer: In Perth's climate, we recommend cleaning every 6–12 months depending on dust and wildlife activity. A clean system generates up to 25% more power than a dirty one.

faqs.question: Do you provide ongoing monitoring of my system's performance?
faqs.answer: Yes. We install monitoring systems that track your energy production in real-time. If output drops unexpectedly, we investigate and fix the issue quickly.

seo.title: Solar Panel Maintenance & Monitoring in Leeming | West Coast Solar
seo.description: Solar panel cleaning and monitoring services in Leeming. West Coast Solar keeps your system efficient and performing at peak output. Call for a service quote.

faqs.question: How much can I save on electricity bills in Leeming?
faqs.answer: A typical 6.6kW solar system in Leeming generates significant surplus in summer months. With battery storage added, you can store that energy for evening use, cutting grid electricity by 50–80%. Exact savings depend on system size, roof orientation, and consumption patterns. Wade offers a free assessment tailored to your Leeming home.

items.question: How much does a solar installation cost?
items.answer: Solar system costs vary based on your home's size, roof condition, and energy needs. We provide free quotes tailored to your situation. Most residential systems range from 5kW to 10kW. Contact us today for a personalised quote.

items.question: What is the best time to install solar?
items.answer: Solar systems generate electricity year-round in Western Australia, even on cloudy days. However, Perth's abundant sunshine—over 3,200 hours annually—makes any time ideal. We can install on your schedule.

items.question: Do I need battery storage with my solar system?
items.answer: Battery storage is optional but offers significant benefits. It allows you to use stored solar energy at night, maximise self-consumption, and provides backup during grid outages. We'll help you decide what's right for your home and budget.

items.question: How long does an installation take?
items.answer: Most residential solar installations are completed in one to two days, depending on system size and roof complexity. We'll provide a clear timeline during your quote consultation.

items.question: What rebates and incentives are available?
items.answer: Western Australia offers various rebates and incentives for solar installations, including Small-scale Technology Certificates (STCs). We handle all paperwork and rebate applications for you, maximising your savings.

items.question: What warranty do you offer?
items.answer: We provide comprehensive warranties covering our installation workmanship. Solar panels typically come with 25-year manufacturer warranties. Battery systems have warranties ranging from 10 to 15 years depending on the product.

about.heading: About West Coast Solar
about.body:
West Coast Solar is a locally-owned and operated solar installation company based in Leeming, Perth. Founded by Wade, our business is built on a foundation of expertise, professionalism, and genuine care for our customers' experience.

We specialise in residential solar panel installations and battery storage systems across Perth's southern suburbs. From your initial consultation through to system handover and ongoing support, we manage every step with meticulous attention to detail. Our team handles all the technical work, paperwork, and rebate applications, so you can enjoy the benefits of clean energy without the hassle.

What sets us apart is our commitment to quality and customer relationships. Wade personally oversees each installation, ensuring the work meets our high standards. We take pride in our craftsmanship—every panel is mounted neatly, every connection is secure, and every system is thoroughly tested. Our repeat customers and strong local reputation reflect our dedication to delivering exceptional results that families can rely on for years to come.

values.title: Quality Craftsmanship
values.body: Professional installation with meticulous attention to detail. Every system is built to last.

values.body: We handle all paperwork, rebates, and support so you can focus on enjoying your clean energy.

values.body: Owner-led experience serving Perth's southern suburbs. Wade brings years of solar expertise to every project.
